title: Islamabad tightens security: Pakistan locks down Serena Hotel; US–Iran talks loom
summary_full: As Islamabad readies itself for pivotal talks between the US and Iran, the city is buzzing with heightened security measures. The Serena Hotel is at the epicenter of this diplomatic event, fortified by increased surveillance and restricted access to guarantee the safety of all attending delegates.
